# ADR-0001: First decision

## Status

Accepted — 2026-01-05

## Context

A well-formed decision. This repo declares `numbering_gaps: fail` in
`.duckadrift.yml` — the gap between this ADR and the next one must surface
as fact, not advisory, proving the strict override actually changes
behavior rather than being silently ignored.

## Decision

N/A — fixture file.

## Consequences

None beyond the seeded D1 numbering-gap violation.
